payload.answer: The input is primarily an article note because the user explicitly asks to remember an article URL with a stated reason. It also includes a brief source summary and a key takeaway about graph memory, relationships, provenance, and update semantics.
citations: Remember this article: https://example.com/ai-memory why: useful for thinking about knowledge graph memory design.
